case.title: ALMOURS SECURITIES v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h1: ALMOURS SECURITIES v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE, 302 U.S. 765 (1938)
opinion.h2: ALMOURS SECURITIES, Inc., petitioner, v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE.* No. 613.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Warren W. Grimes, of Washington, D. C., and Henry P. Adair, of Jacksonville, Fla., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 303 U.S. 666, 58 S. Ct. 525, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Almours Securities v. Commissioner of Internal Revenue 302 U.S. 765 (1938) ]
